items.title: Hollander POTD Archie Clark aka Shake & Bake. Minnesota G was drafted 37th by LAL in 66. Had 20 ppg in 67-68 but traded to PHI (for Wilt). Had 18 ppg in 2.5 yrs in PHI before trade to BAL in 71. Peaked at 25 ppg  in 71-72 but declined by 74. Retired in 76. Had a bad ass goatee.

items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt: 🗣️”I don’t really know if I ever told Bud that, but that meant so much. I would say not only to me, but to our entire team, ‘cause when you allow us to be ourselves with the people that we love, it just makes us trust him and it makes us trust our teammates even more.” - Jrue Holiday 🏆
